openmeter/subscription/entitlement.purpose: Bridge adapter between the subscription and entitlement domains. Implements subscription.EntitlementAdapter (ScheduleEntitlement, GetForSubscriptionsAt, DeleteByItemID) so subscription items can schedule, query, and delete entitlements without subscription/service importing entitlement.Service directly.

patterns.name: Interface compliance assertion
patterns.description: Assert the target interface with a blank var _ at file top.

patterns.name: Transaction wrapping via transaction.Run
patterns.description: Every write runs in transaction.Run(ctx, a.txCreator, ...) so it rebinds to any tx already in ctx.
patterns.example: return transaction.Run(ctx, a.txCreator, func(ctx context.Context) (*subscription.SubscriptionEntitlement, error) { ... })

patterns.name: SubscriptionManaged + annotation merge
patterns.description: ScheduleEntitlement sets CreateEntitlementInputs.SubscriptionManaged = true and merges caller annotations before delegating.

patterns.name: Bulk fetch with zero-value pagination
patterns.description: GetForSubscriptionsAt lists entitlements with pagination.Page{} (zero value) to fetch all; never pass a filtered page.
patterns.example: Page: pagination.Page{}, // zero value so all entitlements are fetched

key_file_guides.role: Concrete subscription.EntitlementAdapter: ScheduleEntitlement, GetForSubscriptionsAt, DeleteByItemID.
key_file_guides.watch_for: DeleteByItemID reads itemRepo.GetByID first to find the EntitlementID — the item must exist and have a non-nil EntitlementID.

key_file_guides.role: NotFoundError for a missing entitlement on a subscription item.
key_file_guides.watch_for: At field is optional; check IsZero() before rendering in messages.

anti_patterns: Calling entitlement.Service directly from subscription service code instead of via EntitlementSubscriptionAdapter.
Omitting transaction.Run around entitlement writes — falls off the caller's tx.
Setting SubscriptionManaged = false on subscription-owned entitlements.
Passing a non-zero pagination.Page to GetForSubscriptionsAt.

decisions.decision: Separate package for entitlement bridging rather than inline in subscription/service.
decisions.rationale: Keeps subscription.Service free of direct entitlement.Service imports and makes the boundary independently testable/mockable.

code_examples.scenario: Schedule an entitlement for a new subscription item inside a transaction

openmeter/subscription/patch.purpose: Concrete Patch implementations (PatchAddItem, PatchRemoveItem, PatchAddPhase, PatchRemovePhase, PatchStretchPhase, PatchUnscheduleEdit) that mutate a *SubscriptionSpec in-memory via ApplyTo. These are the only authorised mutation primitives for subscription specs.

patterns.name: Patch interface compliance assertion
patterns.description: Each patch asserts subscription.Patch or subscription.ValuePatch[T] via blank var _.

patterns.name: ApplyTo is the sole mutation point
patterns.description: Every patch implements ApplyTo(spec *subscription.SubscriptionSpec, actx subscription.ApplyContext) error.
patterns.example: func (a PatchAddItem) ApplyTo(spec *subscription.SubscriptionSpec, actx subscription.ApplyContext) error { ... }

patterns.name: Temporal guard: no past-phase mutations
patterns.description: Add/remove/stretch patches return PatchForbiddenError if the target phase starts before the current phase computed from actx.CurrentTime.

patterns.name: Current-phase item versioning: close then append
patterns.description: Items in the current phase are soft-closed (ActiveToOverrideRelativeToPhaseStart) and a new entry appended — never deleted.

patterns.name: ISO duration arithmetic for phase spacing
patterns.description: AddPhase/StretchPhase shift phases with datetime.ISODuration.Add/Subtract, not wall-clock arithmetic.

patterns.name: Typed patch errors
patterns.description: Return PatchValidationError / PatchForbiddenError / PatchConflictError so callers can distinguish failure modes.

patterns.name: Generic test suite
patterns.description: Patch tests use testsuite[T subscription.AppliesToSpec] + testcase[T] with GetSpec/GetExpectedSpec lambdas; call suite.Run(t).

key_file_guides.role: PatchAddItem: adds a new item version to a phase; handles current-phase auto-close.
key_file_guides.watch_for: If ActiveFromOverrideRelativeToPhaseStart is nil when adding to the current phase it is auto-computed from phaseStart to actx.CurrentTime.

key_file_guides.role: PatchRemoveItem: soft-removes last item version in current phase or hard-deletes from a future phase.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Future-phase removal deletes the entry; current-phase removal only sets ActiveTo. Prior versions stay intact.

key_file_guides.role: PatchAddPhase: inserts a future phase and shifts later phases by its duration.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Duration on CreateSubscriptionPhaseInput drives the shift; omitting it leaves no gap.

key_file_guides.role: PatchRemovePhase: deletes a future phase with Shift=Next (compress) or Shift=Prev (gap).
key_file_guides.watch_for: Only future phases removable; current/past return PatchForbiddenError.

key_file_guides.role: PatchStretchPhase: shifts phases after the target by a signed ISO duration.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Negative durations (shrink) allowed; guard prevents compressing a phase to zero length.

key_file_guides.role: PatchUnscheduleEdit: removes future scheduled item versions from the current phase.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Operates only on the current phase; no-ops if no future edits exist.

key_file_guides.role: Shared test infra: testsuite/testcase generics, getDefaultSpec, TestRemoveAdd.
key_file_guides.watch_for: getDefaultSpec uses subscriptiontestutils.GetExamplePlanInput; assumes >=3 phases (test_phase_1/2/3).

anti_patterns: Mutating spec.Phases directly outside an ApplyTo method — bypasses temporal and versioning guards.
Using wall-clock time.Duration for phase spacing instead of datetime.ISODuration.
Returning a plain error instead of PatchValidationError/PatchForbiddenError/PatchConflictError.
Hard-deleting items from the current phase instead of soft-closing them.

decisions.decision: Current-phase items are soft-closed, not deleted.
decisions.rationale: Billing sync reads item cadences to determine billable periods; deletion would lose the active window and falsify history.

decisions.decision: Phase spacing uses ISO duration arithmetic, not absolute timestamps.
decisions.rationale: Phases use relative StartAfter durations from ActiveFrom; ISO durations avoid DST and calendar edge cases.

code_examples.scenario: Apply a remove-then-add patch sequence atomically

openmeter/subscription/repo.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL persistence layer for subscriptions, phases, and items. Implements subscription.SubscriptionRepository, SubscriptionPhaseRepository, and SubscriptionItemRepository sharing the TransactingRepo + Tx/WithTx/Self triad.

patterns.name: TransactingRepo wrapping on every method
patterns.description: Every public method body wraps in entutils.TransactingRepo (or WithNoValue) to rebind to a ctx-carried tx.
patterns.example: return entutils.TransactingRepo(ctx, r, func(ctx context.Context, repo *subscriptionItemRepo) (...) { ... })

patterns.name: Tx / Self / WithTx triad
patterns.description: transaction.go implements the triad using db.HijackTx + entutils.NewTxDriver; WithTx rebuilds the repo from the tx client.

patterns.name: Soft-delete via SetDeletedAt
patterns.description: Deletes set DeletedAt; queries filter with DeletedAtIsNil()/DeletedAtGT(now).

patterns.name: DB error mapping to domain errors
patterns.description: db.IsNotFound(err) after every query, mapped to domain not-found errors.

patterns.name: MapDB* for Ent→domain conversion
patterns.description: All reads go through mapping.go MapDBSubscription/MapDBSubscripitonPhase/MapDBSubscriptionItem — never inline field mapping.

patterns.name: Predicate helpers in utils.go
patterns.description: SubscriptionActiveAt/ActiveInPeriod/NotDeletedAt return []predicate.Subscription; compose with Where(preds...).

key_file_guides.role: CRUD + List for Subscription; List filters by customer, status, active period, pagination.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Status filtering builds OR predicate blocks — a new status needs a new predicate branch.

key_file_guides.role: CRUD for SubscriptionPhase; GetForSubscriptionsAt bulk-loads.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Phase queries do NOT eager-load items; items load separately via subscriptionItemRepo.

key_file_guides.role: CRUD for SubscriptionItem; Create maps rate-card fields manually.
key_file_guides.watch_for: EntitlementTemplate and TaxConfig use custom value scanners — nil-check before Set.

key_file_guides.role: Ent→domain conversion; MapDBSubscriptionItem requires the eager-loaded Phase edge.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Always call WithPhase() on item queries; missing edge makes MapDBSubscriptionItem error at runtime.

key_file_guides.role: Tx/Self/WithTx for all three repo types.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Omitting WithTx makes TransactingRepo open a new tx instead of joining the caller's.

key_file_guides.role: Shared Ent predicate builders for time-range queries.
key_file_guides.watch_for: SubscriptionActiveInPeriod uses StartBoundedPeriod (open end); To==nil means no upper bound.

anti_patterns: Omitting the entutils.TransactingRepo wrapper — bypasses any caller-supplied transaction.
Querying items without WithPhase() eager-load — MapDBSubscriptionItem fails at runtime.
Inlining Ent→domain conversion instead of using MapDB* functions.
Hard-deleting rows instead of soft-deleting via SetDeletedAt.

decisions.decision: Soft delete via DeletedAt for all three entity types.
decisions.rationale: Billing sync reads historical item cadences; permanent deletion would lose the window data needed for invoice line generation.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new query method with transaction support and eager-loaded edges

openmeter/subscription/service.purpose: Core implementation of subscription.Service: orchestrates Create/Update/Delete/Cancel/Continue/GetView/List/ExpandViews by coordinating repos, EntitlementAdapter, CustomerService, and event publishing inside pg-advisory-locked transactions.

patterns.name: NewSubscriptionOperationContext on every public method
patterns.description: Each exported method calls ctx = subscription.NewSubscriptionOperationContext(ctx) first to set a context key preventing hook re-entrancy.

patterns.name: pg-advisory lock per customer before mutations
patterns.description: Create and Cancel acquire s.lockCustomer(ctx, customerId) inside the transaction.
patterns.example: if err := s.lockCustomer(ctx, spec.CustomerId); err != nil { return def, err }

patterns.name: Hook fan-out with errors.Join
patterns.description: Before/After hooks fan out to all registered SubscriptionCommandHooks via errors.Join(lo.Map(s.Hooks, ...)).
patterns.example: err = errors.Join(lo.Map(s.Hooks, func(v subscription.SubscriptionCommandHook, _ int) error { return v.BeforeCreate(ctx, namespace, spec) })...)

patterns.name: sync() as the universal diff-apply engine
patterns.description: Update, Cancel, and Continue all build a new spec and call s.sync(ctx, currentView, newSpec) — never mutate entities directly.
patterns.example: spec.ActiveTo = lo.ToPtr(cancelTime); sub, err := s.sync(ctx, view, spec)

patterns.name: State machine transition guard
patterns.description: Delete/Cancel check subscription.NewStateMachine(status).CanTransitionOrErr() before the transaction.
patterns.example: if err := subscription.NewStateMachine(status).CanTransitionOrErr(ctx, subscription.SubscriptionActionDelete); err != nil { return err }

patterns.name: Publish event after every mutation
patterns.description: After a successful mutation the service publishes via s.Publisher (NewCreatedEvent, NewUpdatedEvent, ...).

patterns.name: ServiceConfig constructor injection
patterns.description: New(ServiceConfig) takes all deps as struct fields; the unique-constraint validator self-registers via RegisterHook inside New().

key_file_guides.role: Create, Update, Delete, Cancel, Continue, Get, GetView, List, ExpandViews, UpdateAnnotations, RegisterHook.
key_file_guides.watch_for: ExpandViews requires all subs to share one customer ID; mixed customers produce incorrect views.

key_file_guides.role: validateCreate/Update/Cancel/Continue — pure validation of state transitions, currency, timing.
key_file_guides.watch_for: validateCreate checks customer.Currency vs spec.Currency only when spec.HasBillables() is true.

key_file_guides.role: sync() diffs current view vs new spec and issues create/delete/update on repos and EntitlementAdapter.
key_file_guides.watch_for: sync() is the single authorised spec→DB path; do not call repo methods directly from mutators.

key_file_guides.role: createPhase/deletePhase/createItem/deleteItem building blocks for sync().
key_file_guides.watch_for: createItem calls EntitlementAdapter.ScheduleEntitlement for items with entitlement templates; missing wiring causes nil-deref.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests needing live Postgres via subscriptiontestutils.SetupDBDeps + NewService.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Existing tests use context.Background(); prefer t.Context() for new tests.

anti_patterns: Calling repo methods directly from service methods instead of routing through sync().
Adding a mutation without NewSubscriptionOperationContext(ctx) at entry.
Omitting the customer advisory lock for operations that write subscription or item rows.
Adding a hook without errors.Join fan-out — partial failure would be swallowed.
Publishing events before the transaction commits.

decisions.decision: Cancel and Continue reuse sync() by building a new spec with modified ActiveTo.
decisions.rationale: sync() is the single truth for spec→DB reconciliation; duplicating logic would drift and introduce partial-write bugs.

decisions.decision: pg-advisory lock per customer ID acquired inside the transaction.
decisions.rationale: Serialises concurrent subscription mutations for the same customer; the lock releases automatically on commit/rollback.

code_examples.scenario: Wire up a new subscription.Service via ServiceConfig
code_examples.code:
svc, err := service.New(service.ServiceConfig{
  SubscriptionRepo:      repo.NewSubscriptionRepo(dbClient),
  SubscriptionPhaseRepo: repo.NewSubscriptionPhaseRepo(dbClient),
  SubscriptionItemRepo:  repo.NewSubscriptionItemRepo(dbClient),
  CustomerService:       customerSvc,
  EntitlementAdapter:    entitlementAdapter,
  TransactionManager:    dbClient,
  Publisher:             eventbusPublisher,
  Lockr:                 locker,
  // ...
})

openmeter/subscription/testutils.purpose: Shared test fixtures and dependency builders for the subscription domain: SubscriptionDependencies (a fully wired set of real services from Ent adapters), example entities, comparison helpers, and mocks. Must NOT import app/common (import-cycle boundary).

patterns.name: NewService builds the full dependency graph from constructors
patterns.description: NewService(t, dbDeps) wires customer/subject/entitlement/plan/addon/subscription/workflow from their underlying constructors, not app/common Wire providers.

patterns.name: SetupDBDeps provisions a real migrated Postgres
patterns.description: SetupDBDeps(t) calls testutils.InitPostgresDB, runs migrate.Up(), returns DBDeps; tests must register deps.Cleanup via t.Cleanup.

patterns.name: Example* vars are canonical test data; clone before use
patterns.description: ExampleRateCard1–5 etc. are package-level vars; always Clone() before using as plan/subscription input to avoid cross-test mutation.

patterns.name: CreateTestAddon does create+publish
patterns.description: deps.AddonService.CreateTestAddon(t, inp) creates and immediately publishes the addon (the required two-step flow).

patterns.name: MockService / MockWorkflowService with Fn fields
patterns.description: Wire only the Fn fields for methods under test; leave others nil to panic on unexpected calls.

key_file_guides.role: NewService — canonical wiring entry point; SubscriptionDependencies holds all assembled services.
key_file_guides.watch_for: After SetDBClient, read back meterID via GetMeterByIDOrSlug — pgtestdb template reuse can resolve a different ID.

key_file_guides.role: SetupDBDeps with mutex-guarded Postgres provisioning and full migration.
key_file_guides.watch_for: sync.Mutex serialises DB setup; parallel subtests must each call SetupDBDeps.

key_file_guides.role: ValidateSpecAndView deep-compares spec vs view incl. entitlement/feature/phase alignment.
key_file_guides.watch_for: UsagePeriod alignment uses Truncate(time.Minute) — avoid sub-minute precision in fixtures.

key_file_guides.role: CreatePlanWithAddon, CreateSubscriptionFromPlan, CreateAddonForSubscription scenario builders.
key_file_guides.watch_for: CreateAddonForSubscription encodes a Quantity=0 terminal entry; use CreateMultiInstanceAddonForSubscription for multi-instance.

key_file_guides.role: testPlanbuilder and testSubscriptionSpecBuilder fluent DSLs.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Build() calls SyncAnnotations + Validate — always use Build(), not the spec directly.

key_file_guides.role: MockService and MockWorkflowService.
key_file_guides.watch_for: MockWorkflowService does not implement Restore/AddAddon/ChangeAddonQuantity — calling them panics.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common from testutils — causes import cycles.
Using ExampleRateCard* vars directly without Clone() — shared vars mutate across tests.
Calling service.CreateAddon without PublishAddon — use CreateTestAddon.
Constructing SubscriptionDependencies manually instead of via NewService — misses required hook registration.
Using context.Background() instead of t.Context() in helpers.

decisions.decision: All services built from package constructors, not app/common Wire providers.
decisions.rationale: Prevents import cycles and keeps test wiring independent of production DI changes.

decisions.decision: ValidateSpecAndView validates entitlement alignment against billingAnchor.
decisions.rationale: Entitlement UsagePeriod must anchor to subscription BillingAnchor — a billing correctness invariant tests must enforce.

code_examples.scenario: Set up a full subscription integration test with plan and addon
code_examples.code:
func TestMyFeature(t *testing.T) {
  dbDeps := subscriptiontestutils.SetupDBDeps(t)
  t.Cleanup(func() { dbDeps.Cleanup(t) })
  deps := subscriptiontestutils.NewService(t, dbDeps)
  plan, addon := subscriptiontestutils.CreatePlanWithAddon(t, deps,
    subscriptiontestutils.GetExamplePlanInput(t),
    subscriptiontestutils.GetExampleAddonInput(t, period))
  subView := subscriptiontestutils.CreateSubscriptionFromPlan(t, &deps, plan, clock.Now())
  subscriptiontestutils.ValidateSpecAndView(t, expectedSpec, subView)
}
